artifacts.summary: Partial: phases 1-3 completed (v4). Phase 4 not started on v5 plan.

partial_progress.details: Agent hit context limits before starting Phase 4 of v5 plan. Phases 1-3 were completed in previous v4 implementation (WitnessChainFMCS.lean, ClosureSaturation.lean architecture). Phase 4 (closure-saturated BFMCS construction) requires: constantFMCS, closureFamilies, modal_forward/backward proofs, temporal coherence.

review_reason: Agent context exhausted before meaningful progress on Phase 4. Additionally, agent created IncrementalTimeline.lean which is for task 981, not task 982. User should decide how to proceed.
